category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tfproviderlint as a Terraform Provider lint tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as tfproviderlint.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page and README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/bflad/tfproviderlint, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Terraform Provider linting; current_curation.tags includes cli.
